name: Maryland Lady Crab Cakes
recipeIngredient: Margarine; butter or oil; for frying
recipeInstructions:
Remove all cartilage from crabmeat. In a bowl, mix breadcrumbs, egg (s), mayonnaise and seasonings. Add crabmeat and mix gently but thoroughly. If mixture is too dry, add a little more mayonnaise. Shape into six cakes. Cook cakes in a fry pan, in just enough fat to prevent sticking, until browned; about 5 minutes on each side.
If desired, crab cakes may be deep fried at 350 degrees, two to three minutes, or until browned.
